_comment: PLAN-041 Phase 3 / ADR-062 — embedding model manifest. PLACEHOLDER: production SHA256 values are populated when the adopter runs the install-sidecar.sh --populate-manifest step against the pinned HuggingFace revision. See security-engineer Round 1 debate P0-2 #3.

bge-m3.notes: Default embedding model for LightRAG sidecar. 1024-dim multilingual embeddings.

verification_protocol.on_install: install-sidecar.sh refuses to proceed if any sha256 is PLACEHOLDER. Adopter must either (a) regenerate the manifest against a trusted mirror + commit the hashes, or (b) use --skip-model-verify flag with two-factor env `CEO_RAG_UNVERIFIED_MODEL_ACK=I-ACCEPT-MODEL-INTEGRITY-RISK`.
verification_protocol.on_sidecar_start: sidecar verifies model file sha256 matches manifest before loading; refuses to start on mismatch.
verification_protocol.on_model_upgrade: new sha256 + hf_revision committed via same PR workflow as requirements.lock regeneration.
